positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, and repeating geometric illustration featuring stylized botanical elements (e.g., blooming crescent moons, winding vines, exotic ferns) integrated with celestial motifs (stars, orbiting planets, nebulae). The overall style is Art Deco meets Neo-Victorian scientific illustration, utilizing strong, clean silhouettes and symmetrical composition. The color palette must be limited and luxurious: deep indigo and teal contrasted sharply with muted gold and cream. The composition should be perfectly centered, forming a cohesive, seamless pattern that looks exceptional as a print repeat on fabric. High contrast, crisp lines, intricate detail, vector illustration quality, no gradient wash.
